name: Bob Gaudio
abstract: Robert John Gaudio (born November 17, 1942) is an American singer, songwriter, musician, and record producer, best known mainly as the keyboardist and backing vocalist of the 1960s pop rock band The Four Seasons. Gaudio wrote or co-wrote the vast majority of the group's music, including hits like "Sherry" and "December, 1963 (Oh, What a …

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Calello
about_quotes.evidence: Sandy Linzer also wrote “Dawn (Go Away)” with Bob Gaudio... My father actually introduced me to him. So after they had a couple of hit records with Bob Crewe they decided to produce a record on their own. So I would sit with them and they would play me the song and then I would write the arrangement
